work_item.description: Discover how claude-factory should handle concurrent interactive phases (discovery, architecture) in a single-session conductor loop. The core problem: both discovery and architecture involve human-approval gates (ask_human steps), and the conductor loop is strictly sequential — cf_next_step may interleave questions from both phases in a single conversation thread with no clear context separation, creating confusion about what's being asked and why. Options to explore include: (1) enforcing only one interactive phase in-progress at a time, (2) surfacing phase context prominently with each ask_human presentation, (3) deferring concurrent interactive phases to separate sessions (M7+ multi-session). Produce a product brief covering the problem, target users, value proposition, and four risks, plus the workflows the solution must support.
